title: F: Vol Term Structure & Theta Decay
headline: HL perp BTC Parkinson σ is 50.2% ann. at 24h, 34.0% at 1h (contango). Binary markets show gradual theta decay. Vol risk premium +14.0% ann. (n=30 expiries). Vol-regime predictiveness: Pearson r=0.53 (n=35).

metrics.name: term_structure_shape
metrics.sanity: slope direction confirmed on full corpus

metrics.name: diurnal_peak_utc_hour
metrics.sanity: peak should reflect Asian/Euro session overlap

metrics.name: theta_decay_shape
metrics.sanity: binary options theory predicts accelerating decay near expiry

metrics.name: vol_premium_mean_ann
metrics.sanity: positive premium → market overprices vol → theta-harvest is paid

verdict: Vol term structure is contango (24h σ 50.2% vs 1h σ 34.0%). Intraday peak at UTC 14:00. Theta decay is gradual — uncertainty collapses gradually over the trading day. Implied-vs-realized vol premium: +14.0% ann. across 30 expiries (split-half STABLE). Opening σ predicts intraday range: Pearson r=0.53 (actionable).
